chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 462 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 1895/2022 3.For hearing of main case 4.For orders on CMA 1896/2022 26-04-2023 None present for the petitioner. ***** None present for the petitioner; same was the position on the last date of hearing, which shows that the petitioner after filing instant petition has lost his interest. Accordingly, this petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
